alt: Sea otter resting in cool Pacific coastal water
caption: Sea otters survive best where healthy kelp-rich coasts still provide food and shelter.
acquisitionNotes: Core article image curated separately from the otter gallery set. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/2/27/Sea_Otter_at_Piedras_Blancas.jpeg
